{{Short description|Pornographic film award presented annually by AVN}}
{{Use Indian English|date=January 2026}}
{{Use mdy dates|date=January 2026}}
{{Infobox film award
| name = [[AVN Award]] for Male Performer of the Year
| image = 
| image_size = 
| alt = 
| caption = The 2026 Recipient: Vince Karter 
| subheader = AVN award for contributions of [[pornographic actor#Male performers|male performers]] to [[pornography]]
| awarded_for = Best Performance by a [[pornographic actor#Male performers|Male Performer]] 
| presenter = [[AVN Media Network]]
| sponsor = [[AVN (magazine)|''AVN'']]
| location = [[Las Vegas]]
| country = [[United States|USA]]
| firstawarded = {{start date and age|1993}}
| lastawarded = 2026
| reward = 
| former name = 
| holder_label = Most recent winner
| holder =  Vince Karter
| most_wins = [[Manuel Ferrara]]<br>(6 awards)
| award1_type = Total awarded
| award1_winner = 34
| award2_type = First winner
| award2_winner = [[Rocco Siffredi]]
| most_nominations = [[Manuel Ferrara]] and [[Erik Everhard]]<br>(14 nominations)
| website        = {{URL|http://avnawards.avn.com}}
}}
The '''AVN Award for Male Performer of the Year''' is an award that has been given annually by [[sex industry]] company [[AVN (magazine)|''AVN'']] since the award's inception in 1993.<ref name="avnwin1993"/>

First recipient of the award was [[Rocco Siffredi]], who was awarded at [[10th AVN Awards]] in 1993. As of 2026, [[Manuel Ferrara]] is the most honored pornographic actor with six awards followed by [[Lexington Steele]], [[Mick Blue]] and [[Evan Stone]] with three awards, while four pornographic actors{{en dash}}[[Rocco Siffredi]], [[James Deen]], Small Hands and [[Tom Byron]]{{en dash}}have won the award two times. [[Tommy Pistol]] is the oldest recipient of the award at the age of 45 in 2022 and [[James Deen]] is the youngest recipient of the award at the age of 22 in 2009.<ref>{{cite news |title=What Women Want: Porn and the Frontier of Female Sexuality |url=https://magazine.good.is/articles/what-women-want |newspaper=[[Good (magazine)|Good]] |date=November 15, 2011 |access-date=June 9, 2021 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160125115839/https://magazine.good.is/articles/what-women-want |archive-date=January 25, 2016 |url-status=dead }}</ref> The most recent recipient is Vince Karter, who was honoured at the [[42nd AVN Awards]] in 2026.<ref name="Winners2026"/>

==Winners and nominees==
<!-- Images of multiple winners are only given here -->
[[File:Manuel Ferrara 2010.jpg|thumb|upright|[[Manuel Ferrara]] has been the most frequent winner of the award (six times).]]
{{multiple image
<!-- Essential parameters -->
| align     = right
| direction = vertical
| footer    = [[Lexington Steele]] (top), [[Mick Blue]] (middle)  and [[Evan Stone]] (bottom) have won the award three times each.
| width     = 170
<!-- Image 1 -->
| image1    = Lexington Steele 00072970 cropped.jpg
| width1    = 130
| alt1      = Lexington Steele
| caption1  =

<!-- Image 2 -->
| image2    = Mick Blue 2015.jpg
| width2    = 130
| alt2      = Mick Blue
| caption2  =

<!-- Image 3 -->
| image3    = AN Evan Stone 1.JPG
| width3    = 130
| alt3      = Evan Stone
| caption3  =
}}
{{multiple image
<!-- Essential parameters -->
| align     = right
| direction = vertical
| footer    = From top to bottom: [[Rocco Siffredi]], [[James Deen]]  and [[Tom Byron]] and Small Hands have won the award two times each.
| width     = 170
<!-- Image 1 -->
| image1    = Rocco Siffredi - Lucca Comics & Games 2016.jpg
| width1    = 130
| alt1      = Rocco Siffredi
| caption1  =

<!-- Image 2 -->
| image2    = James Deen 2011.jpg
| width2    = 130
| alt2      = James Deen
| caption2  =

<!-- Image 3 -->
| image3    = Tom Byron 2006.JPG
| width3    = 130
| alt3      = Tom Byron
| caption3  =

<!-- Image 4 -->
| image4    = Master Gio and Small Hands at Inked Awards 2016 (31953511745).jpg
| width4    = 130
| alt4      = Small Hands
| caption4  =
}}
===1990s===
{|Class="wikitable sortable"
! Year
! Photo
! Winner
! Nominee(s)
! Ref(s)
|-
|[[10th AVN Awards|1993<br/>{{small|(10th)}}]]
|[[File:Rocco Siffredi 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|Mike Horner
|<ref name="avnwin1993">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131230233228/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1993 |title=1993 AVN Awards Show – History|work=AVN|archive-date=December 30, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1993 |access-date=March 16, 2015}}</ref><ref name="avnwin&nom1993">{{cite magazine |last=Ross |first=Gene |title=The Adult Video News Awards, 1993 The Year of Gere|magazine=Adult Video News |location=Upper Darby, Pennsylvania|publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=March 1993 |volume=8 |issue=4 |pages=32–44 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref>{{cite AV media |people=Di Mercurio, S. Marco (Director) |year=1993 |title=The 10th Annual Adult Video News Awards |medium=videotape |publisher=[[VCA Pictures]] }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |title=On the Road: 1993 Adult Video Awards, Las Vegas, Nevada |magazine=Cheri |location=New York, New York |publisher=Cheri Magazine, Inc. |date=June 1993 |pages=20–27 |issn=1059-7131}}</ref>
|-
|[[11th AVN Awards|1994<br/>{{small|(11th)}}]]
|[[File:Jonathan Morgan.JPG|180px]]
! [[Jonathan Morgan (director)|Jonathan Morgan]]
|valign="top" |
* [[T. T. Boy]]
* [[Jon Dough]]
* [[Steve Drake]]
* Mike Horner
* [[Sean Michaels (actor)|Sean Michaels]]
* [[Rocco Siffredi]]
* [[Joey Silvera]]
* [[Max Hardcore|Max Steiner]]
* [[Marc Wallice]]
|<ref name="avnwin1994">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140118084332/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1994 |title=1994 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=January 18, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1994 |access-date=March 24, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite AV media |people=Di Mercurio, S. Marco (Director) |year=1994 |title=The 11th Annual Adult Video News Awards |medium=videotape |publisher=[[VCA Pictures]] }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |last=Ross |first=Gene |title=Tits & Sluts & Rock 'n' Roll: The 11th Annual AVN Awards Show|magazine=Adult Video News |location=Upper Darby, Pennsylvania|publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=March 1994 |volume=9 |issue=4 |pages=14–74 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |title=The 1994 AVN Awards Show |magazine=Official Program |location=Upper Darby, Pennsylvania |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=January 8, 1994 }}</ref>
|-
|[[12th AVN Awards|1995<br/>{{small|(12th)}}]]
|[[File:Jon Dough 2005 AVN Expo.jpg|180px]]
! [[Jon Dough]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Sean Michaels (actor)|Sean Michaels]]
* [[Alex Sanders (actor)|Alex Sanders]]
|<ref name="avnwin1995">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131029205723/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1995 |title=1995 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=October 29, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1995 |access-date=March 24, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite AV media |people=Stone, Mark (Director) |year=1995 |title=The 12th Annual AVN Awards Show |medium=videotape |publisher=[[VCA Pictures]] }}</ref><ref name="avnwin&nom1995">{{cite magazine |last=Ross |first=Gene |title=Star Light, Star Bright, First Star We See Tonight…|magazine=Adult Video News |location=Los Angeles, California|publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=March 1995 |volume=10 |issue=3 |pages=24–82 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref>
|-
|[[13th AVN Awards|1996<br/>{{small|(13th)}}]]
|[[File:Rocco Siffredi 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[Rocco Siffredi]]
|valign="top" |
* [[T. T. Boy]]
* [[Jon Dough]]
* [[Steve Hatcher]]
* [[Steven St. Croix]]
* [[Alex Sanders (actor)|Alex Sanders]]
* [[Tony Tedeschi]]
|<ref name="avnwin1996">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131029204730/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1996 |title=1996 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=October 29, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1996 |access-date=March 24, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |last=Ross |first=Gene |title=Latex Sweeps 13th Annual AVN Awards Show|magazine=Adult Video News |location=Los Angeles, California|publisher=Adult Video News |date=March 1996 |volume=11 |issue=5 |pages=26–84 }}</ref><ref>{{cite AV media |people=Stone, Mark (Director) |year=1996 |title=The 1996 AVN Awards |medium=videotape |publisher=[[VCA Pictures]] }}</ref>
|-
|[[14th AVN Awards|1997<br/>{{small|(14th)}}]]
|[[File:T. T. Boy.jpg|180px]]
! [[T. T. Boy]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Tom Byron]]
* [[Mark Davis (actor)|Mark Davis]]
* [[Sean Michaels (actor)|Sean Michaels]]
* [[Rodney Moore (actor)|Rodney Moore]]
* [[Jonathan Morgan (director)|Jonathan Morgan]]
* [[Ed Powers]]
* [[Steven St. Croix]]
* [[Alex Sanders (actor)|Alex Sanders]]
* [[Rocco Siffredi]]
* Jake Steed
* [[Max Steiner]]
* [[Vince Vouyer]]
|<ref name="avnwin1997">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131231000936/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1997 |title=1997 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=December 31, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1997 |access-date=March 24, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |title=1997 AVN|magazine=Swank's Video World |location=Paramus, New Jersey|publisher=Swank Publications, Inc. |date=June 1997 |pages=66–67 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |last=Ross |first=Gene |title=Shock, Bobby Sox Dominate the 14th Annual AVN Awards Show|magazine=Adult Video News |location=Van Nuys, California|publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=March 1997 |volume=13 |issue=3 |pages=20–69 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref name="VCA-VHS">{{cite AV media |people=Stone, Mark (Director) |year=1997 |title=1997 AVN Awards |medium=videotape |publisher=[[VCA Pictures]] }}</ref>
|-
|[[15th AVN Awards|1998<br/>{{small|(15th)}}]]
|rowspan="2"|[[File:Tom Byron 2012.jpg|180px]]
! rowspan="2"|[[Tom Byron]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mark Davis (actor)|Mark Davis]]
* [[Rod Fontana]]
* Jack Hammer
* [[Dave Hardman]]
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* [[Sean Michaels (actor)|Sean Michaels]]
* [[Rodney Moore (actor)|Rodney Moore]]
* [[Ed Powers]]
* Jake Steed
* [[Max Hardcore|Max Steiner]]
* [[Vince Vouyer]]
|<ref name="avnwin1998">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140115041053/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1998 |title=1998 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=January 15, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1998 |access-date=March 24, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |last=Ross |first=Gene |title=Buda, Bad Wives & Zazel Take Top Prizes at the 15th Annual AVN Awards|magazine=Adult Video News |location=Van Nuys, California|publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=March 1998 |volume=14 |issue=3 |pages=52–97 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |title=History: The 1998 AVN Awards Show |magazine=Official Program |location=Van Nuys, California |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=January 9, 1998 }}</ref>
|-
|[[16th AVN Awards|1999<br/>{{small|(16th)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Christoph Clark]]
* Van Damage
* [[Dave Hardman]]
* [[Brandon Iron]]
* Mr. Marcus
* Sean Michaels
* [[Alex Sanders (actor)|Alex Sanders]]
* [[Kyle Stone]]
* Vince Vouyer
|<ref name="avnwin1999">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131230233428/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1999 |title=1999 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=December 30, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/1999 |access-date=March 25, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite journal |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=March 1999 |title=The 1999 AVN Awards Winners |journal=Adult Video News |location=Van Nuys, CA |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc.| publication-date=March 1, 1999 |volume=15 |issue=3 |pages=56–58 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref>{{cite journal |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |title=Choices |journal=1999 AVN Awards Show Program |location=Van Nuys, CA |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=January 9, 1999 }}</ref>
|}

===2000s===
{|Class="wikitable sortable"
! Year
! Photo
! Winner
! Nominees
! {{Abbr|Ref(s)|References}}
|-
|[[17th AVN Awards|2000<br/>{{small|(17th)}}]]
|[[File:Lexington Steele 2014.jpg|180px]]
! [[Lexington Steele]]
|valign="top" |
* Chris Cannon
* [[Christoph Clark]]
* Luciano
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* [[Sean Michaels (actor)|Sean Michaels]]
* [[Herschel Savage]]
* [[Rocco Siffredi]]
* [[Randy Spears]]
|<ref name="avnwin2000">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140118083959/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2000 |title=2000 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=January 18, 2014 |url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2000 |access-date=March 25, 2015}}</ref><ref name="AVN-mag">{{cite magazine |last=Ross |first=Gene |title=Double Feature!, Dark Garden and Seven Deadly Sins Take Top Honors At 17th Annual AVN Awards |magazine=Adult Video News |location=Chatsworth, California |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=March 2000 |volume=16 |issue=3 |pages=38–96 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/awards/noms.html |title=AVN 2000 Nominations |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=March 2, 2000 |access-date=February 16, 2016 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20000302100333/http://www.avn.com/awards/noms.html |archive-date=March 2, 2000 }}</ref>
|-
|[[18th AVN Awards|2001<br/>{{small|(18th)}}]]
|[[File:Evan Stone 2017.jpg|180px]]
! [[Evan Stone]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mark Davis (actor)|Mark Davis]]
* [[Dillon Day|Dillion Day]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Max Hardcore]]
* [[Dave Hardman]]
* Luciano
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* [[Rocco Siffredi]]
* [[Randy Spears]]
* [[Nacho Vidal]]
|<ref name="avnwin2001">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131231000934/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2001 |title=2001 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=December 31, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2001 |access-date=March 25, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |last=Ehrlich |first=Susie |date=March 2001 |title=Dark Angels, Les Vampyres and Watchers Reap Souls and Trophies at the 18th Annual AVN Awards |magazine=Adult Video News |location=Chatsworth, California |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |volume=17 |issue=3 |pages=48–83 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=April 2001 |title=AVN Adult Expo 2001 |magazine=Adult Cinema Review |location=New York, New York |publisher=Global Media Group, Ltd. |volume=19 |issue=2 |pages=6–13 |issn=0277-2914 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.html |title=2001 AVN Awards Nominations List |date=November 2000 |archive-date=March 9, 2001 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20010309213908/http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.html|access-date=February 6, 2016|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|-
|[[19th AVN Awards|2002<br/>{{small|(19th)}}]]
|rowspan="2"|[[File:Lexington Steele 2014.jpg|180px]]
! rowspan="2"|[[Lexington Steele]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Christoph Clark]]
* [[Anthony Crane]]
* [[Dillion Day]]
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* [[Rocco Siffredi]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
* Brian Surewood
* [[Nacho Vidal]]
|<ref name="avnwin2002">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131204223517/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2002 |title=2002 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=December 4, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2002 |access-date=April 4, 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |last1=Milne |first1=Carly |last2=Ramone |first2=Mike |date=March 2002 |title=Fade to Black, Euphoria Big Winners at 2002 AVN Awards Show |magazine=Adult Video News |location=Chatsworth, California |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |volume=18 |issue=3 |pages=36–68 |issn=0883-7090 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |title=AVN Awards 2002 |magazine=Adult Cinema Review |location=New York, New York |publisher=Global Media Group Ltd. |date=May 2002 |pages=10–13 |issn=0277-2914 }}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |title=2002 and it's all about...Girls! Girls! Girls! |magazine=The 2002 AVN Awards Show Program |location=Chatsworth, California |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=January 11, 2002 }}</ref>
|-
|[[20th AVN Awards|2003<br/>{{small|(20th)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mark Davis (actor)|Mark Davis]]
* Dillon Day
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Brandon Iron]]
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* [[Wesley Pipes]]
* [[Steven St. Croix]]
* [[Michael Stefano]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
* Lee Stone
* Brian Surewood
|<ref name="avnwin2003">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131029194214/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2003|title=2003 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=October 29, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2003|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |title=20th Anniversary AVN Awards |magazine=The 2003 AVN Awards Show program |location=Chatsworth, California |publisher=AVN Publications, Inc. |date=January 11, 2003 }}</ref>
|-
|[[21st AVN Awards|2004<br/>{{small|(21st)}}]]
|[[File:Michael Stefano AVN Expo 2005.jpg|180px]]
! [[Michael Stefano]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Jay Ashley]]
* [[T. T. Boy]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Brandon Iron]]
* Julian
* [[Nick Manning]]
* Mr. Pete
* [[Randy Spears]]
* [[Steven St. Croix]]
* [[Lexington Steele]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
* Mark Wood
|<ref name="avnwin2004">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131205023920/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2004|title=2004 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|archive-date=December 5, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2004|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/I-AVN-i-Award-Nominations-Released-Winners-Annouced-Jan-10-in-Vegas-37194.html |title=AVN Award Nominations Released; Winners Announced Jan. 10 in Vegas |last1=Brown |first1=Trent |date=December 1, 2003 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 22, 2016 |archive-date=January 28, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160128064902/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/I-AVN-i-Award-Nominations-Released-Winners-Annouced-Jan-10-in-Vegas-37194.html |url-status=dead }}</ref>
|-
|[[22nd AVN Awards|2005<br/>{{small|(22nd)}}]]
|rowspan="2"|[[File: Manuel Ferrara 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|180px]]
! rowspan="2"|[[Manuel Ferrara]]
|valign="top" |
* [[T. T. Boy]]
* [[Derek Hay|Ben English]]
* [[Kurt Lockwood]]
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* Mr. Pete
* [[Randy Spears]]
* [[Michael Stefano]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
* Mark Wood
|<ref name="avnwin2005">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140118084336/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2005|title=2005 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=January 18, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2005|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/2005nominees_fr.shtml |title=2005 AVN Awards Nominations |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=November 14, 2004 |access-date=January 17, 2016 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20041114124447/http://www.avnawards.com/2005nominees_fr.shtml |archive-date=November 14, 2004 }}</ref><ref name="nominations">{{cite web |url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/2005-AVN-Award-Show-Nominations-Announced-41164.html |title=2005 AVN Award Show Nominations Announced |last1=Martin |first1=Ron |date=November 12, 2004 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 17, 2016 |archive-date=January 28, 2016 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160128095351/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/2005-AVN-Award-Show-Nominations-Announced-41164.html |url-status=dead }}</ref>
|-
|[[23rd AVN Awards|2006<br/>{{small|(23rd)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* Otto Bauer
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Tommy Gunn (actor)|Tommy Gunn]]
* [[Kurt Lockwood]]
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* [[Sean Michaels (actor)|Sean Michaels]]
* Mr. Pete
* [[Randy Spears]]
* [[Lexington Steele]]
* [[Michael Stefano]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
* Lee Stone
* [[John Strong (actor)|John Strong]]
|<ref name="avnwin2006">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140222223329/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2006|title=2006 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=February 22, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2006|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf |title=2006 Nominations |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=November 25, 2005 |access-date=January 13, 2016 |url-status=dead  |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20051126013107/http://www.avnawards.com/2006nominations.pdf |archive-date=November 26, 2005 }}</ref>
|-
|[[24th AVN Awards|2007<br/>{{small|(24th)}}]]
|[[File:Tommy Gunn 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|180px]]
! [[Tommy Gunn (actor)|Tommy Gunn]]
|valign="top" |
* Mark Ashley
* [[Marco Banderas]]
* [[James Deen]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* [[Kurt Lockwood]]
* Scott Nails
* Justin Slayer
* [[Lexington Steele]]
* [[Michael Stefano]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
* [[John Strong (actor)|John Strong]]
* Tony T.
|<ref name="avnwin2007">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140222222149/https://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2007|title=2007 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=February 22, 2014|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2007|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/278474AVNNOMSFINALNOV20 |title=AVN Awards 2007 Nominees |author=<!--no by-line.--> |year=2006 |access-date=January 9, 2016 |url-status=dead  |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20061220061002/http://www.avn.com/imagearchive/27/84/74/278474AVNNOMSFINALNOV20 |archive-date=December 20, 2006 }}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.php |title=AVN Awards Nominees |author=<!--no by-line.--> |date=January 1, 2007 |access-date=January 9, 2016 |url-status=dead  |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20070101160858/http://www.avnawards.com/nominees.php |archive-date=January 1, 2007 }}</ref>
|-
|[[25th AVN Awards|2008<br/>{{small|(25th)}}]]
|[[File:Evan Stone 2017.jpg|180px]]
! [[Evan Stone]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Marco Banderas]]
* [[James Deen]]
* Shane Diesel
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* [[Tommy Gunn (pornographic actor)|Tommy Gunn]]
* Dirty Harry
* [[Jean Val Jean (actor)|Jean Val Jean]]
* Charlie Macc
* [[Nick Manning]]
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* Mr. Pete
* [[Randy Spears]]
* Mark Wood
|<ref name="avnwin2008">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131203050255/http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2008|title=2008 AVN Awards Show - History|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|archive-date=December 3, 2013|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/past/winners/2008 |access-date=July 4, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.xbiz.com/news/news_piece.php?id=86872&mi=all&q=avn+hall+of+fame|title=AVN Releases Nominations for 2008 Award Show|author=Tod Hunter|work=XBIZ.com|access-date=April 16, 2015|date=November 26, 2007|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150417044528/http://www.xbiz.com/news/news_piece.php?id=86872&mi=all&q=avn+hall+of+fame|archive-date=April 17, 2015|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|-
|[[26th AVN Awards|2009<br/>{{small|(26th)}}]]
|[[File:James Deen 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[James Deen]]
|valign="top" |
* Mark Ashley
* [[Marco Banderas]]
* [[Mick Blue]]
* [[Tom Byron]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* [[Tommy Gunn (actor)|Tommy Gunn]]
* Shorty Mac
* [[Nick Manning]]
* [[Randy Spears]]
* [[Michael Stefano]]
* [[Steven St. Croix]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
|<ref name="avnwin2009">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/2009-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-56551.html|title=AVN - 2009 AVN Award-Winners Announced|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|last=Sullivan|first=David|date=January 11, 2009|access-date=July 4, 2016|archive-date=May 3, 2012|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120503094829/http://business.avn.com/articles/2009-AVN-Award-Winners-Announced-56551.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://edshull.wordpress.com/2008/12/21/avn-announces-award-nominees/|last=Shull|first=Ed|date=December 21, 2008|title=AVN Announces 2009 Award Nominees|website=Filthy Lucre|access-date=December 20, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180711073838/https://edshull.wordpress.com/2008/12/21/avn-announces-award-nominees/|archive-date=July 11, 2018|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|}

===2010s===
{|Class="wikitable sortable"
! Year
! Photo
! Winner
! Nominees
! {{Abbr|Ref(s)|References}}
|-
|[[27th AVN Awards|2010<br/>{{small|(27th)}}]]
|[[File: Manuel Ferrara 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|180px]]
! [[Manuel Ferrara]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Marco Banderas]]
* [[Mick Blue]]
* [[Tom Byron]]
* [[James Deen]]
* Tony DeSergio
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* [[Sean Michaels (pornographic actor)|Sean Michaels]]
* Mr. Pete
* [[Rocco Reed]]
* Anthony Rosano
* [[Evan Stone]]
* Rico Strong
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="avnwin2010">{{cite web|url=http://www.xbiz.com/news/116352 |title=2010 AVN Adult Movie Awards Winners Announced|work=XBIZ|publisher=Adnet Media|last=Johnson|first=Bob|date=January 11, 2010|access-date=July 24, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite press release|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-2010-AVN-Awards-Announced-370904.html|title=Nominations for 2010 AVN Awards Announced|work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]|date=December 2, 2009|access-date=January 18, 2013|archive-date=March 9, 2013|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130309144055/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-2010-AVN-Awards-Announced-370904.html|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|-
|[[28th AVN Awards|2011<br/>{{small|(28th)}}]]
|[[File:Evan Stone 2017.jpg|180px]]
! [[Evan Stone]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* [[Tom Byron]]
* [[James Deen]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* [[Tommy Gunn (pornographic actor)|Tommy Gunn]]
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* [[Mr. Marcus]]
* Scott Nails
* Mr. Pete
* [[Rocco Reed]]
* Anthony Rosano
* [[Keni Styles]]
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="avnwin2011">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2011-AVN-Awards-421782.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2011 AVN Awards|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|date=January 9, 2011|access-date=July 24, 2016|archive-date=July 7, 2012|archive-url=https://archive.today/20120707163600/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2011-AVN-Awards-421782.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite press release | url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-the-2011-AVN-Awards-Announced-418152.html | title=Nominations for the 2011 AVN Awards Announced | publisher=Adult Video News | date=November 29, 2010 | access-date=January 15, 2013 | archive-date=January 16, 2013 | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130116233533/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-the-2011-AVN-Awards-Announced-418152.html | url-status=dead }}</ref>
|-
|[[29th AVN Awards|2012<br/>{{small|(29th)}}]]
|[[File: Manuel Ferrara 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|180px]]
! [[Manuel Ferrara]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* [[Tom Byron]]
* [[James Deen]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Tommy Gunn (pornographic actor)|Tommy Gunn]]
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* Mr. Pete
* [[Rocco Reed]]
* Anthony Rosano
* [[Lexington Steele]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
* [[Nacho Vidal]]
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="avnwin2012">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-2012-AVN-Award-Winners-461715.html|title=AVN Announces the 2012 AVN Award Winners|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|date=January 22, 2012|access-date=July 2, 2016|archive-date=May 13, 2016|archive-url=https://archive.today/20160513174915/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-2012-AVN-Award-Winners-461715.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite press release | url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Awards-2012-The-Nominees-456084.html | title=AVN Awards 2012: The Nominees | publisher=Adult Video News | date=December 6, 2011 | access-date=January 13, 2013 | archive-date=March 10, 2016 | archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160310063917/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Awards-2012-The-Nominees-456084.html | url-status=dead }}</ref>
|-
|[[30th AVN Awards|2013<br/>{{small|(30th)}}]]
|[[File:James Deen 2010.jpg|180px]]
! [[James Deen]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mike Adriano]]
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Xander Corvus
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* Mandingo
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* Mr. Pete
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* [[Toni Ribas]]
* [[Evan Stone]]
* [[Nacho Vidal]]
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="avnwin2013">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/The-2013-AVN-Award-Winners-503520.html|title=The 2013 AVN Award Winners!|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=July 2, 2016|archive-date=March 28, 2015|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150328015659/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/The-2013-AVN-Award-Winners-503520.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-Nominees-for-2013-AVN-Awards-496615.html|title=AVN Announces Nominees for 2013 AVN Awards|author=Steve Javors|author2=Peter Warren|name-list-style=amp|magazine=Adult Video News|date=November 30, 2012|access-date=January 11, 2013|archive-date=January 17, 2013|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130117065135/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-Nominees-for-2013-AVN-Awards-496615.html|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|-
|[[31st AVN Awards|2014<br/>{{small|(31st)}}]]
|[[File: Manuel Ferrara 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|180px]]
! [[Manuel Ferrara]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Xander Corvus
* [[James Deen]]
* [[Ryan Driller]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* Ryan Madison
* Mandingo
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* [[Toni Ribas]]
* [[Lexington Steele]]
* Christian XXX
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="avnwin2014">{{cite web|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2014-AVN-Awards-544448.html|title=AVN Announces the Winners of the 2014 AVN Awards|work=AVN|date=January 21, 2014|access-date=February 7, 2016|archive-date=February 1, 2016|archive-url=https://archive.today/20160201103626/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/AVN-Announces-the-Winners-of-the-2014-AVN-Awards-544448.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-2014-AVN-Awards-Released-537738.html|title=Nominations for 2014 AVN Awards Released|magazine=Adult Video News|date=December 6, 2013|access-date=January 19, 2014|archive-date=December 4, 2013|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131204222706/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-2014-AVN-Awards-Released-537738.html|url-status=dead}}</ref>
|-
|[[32nd AVN Awards|2015<br/>{{small|(32nd)}}]]
|rowspan="3"|[[File:Mick Blue 2015.jpg|180px]]
! rowspan="3"|[[Mick Blue]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mike Adriano]]
* Xander Corvus
* [[James Deen]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* Mr. Pete
* [[Ramon Nomar]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* [[Toni Ribas]]
* [[Johnny Sins]]
* [[Lexington Steele]]
* Chris Strokes
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="avnwin2015">{{cite web|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150128010221/http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/5|archive-date=January 28, 2015|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/pages/5|title=AVN - 2015 AVN Awards Show|work=AVN|publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=July 2, 2016}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|last1=vanzetti|title=AVN Awards Nominations 2015: Intro and Errata|url=http://blog.iafd.com/2014/11/28/avn-awards-nominations-2015-intro-and-errata/|publisher=[[Internet Adult Film Database]]|access-date=January 17, 2015}}</ref>
|-
|[[33rd AVN Awards|2016<br/>{{small|(33rd)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Flash Brown]]
* Xander Corvus
* [[James Deen]]
* [[Erik Everhard]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* [[Ramon Nomar]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* [[Toni Ribas]]
* [[Lexington Steele]]
* [[Steven St. Croix]]
* Chad White
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref>{{cite magazine|url=http://avnawards.avn.com/winners|title=2016 AVN Awards Winners|access-date=January 24, 2016|date=January 24, 2016|magazine=AVN|archive-date=November 28, 2016|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20161128025847/http://avnawards.avn.com/winners/|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-2016-AVN-Awards-Released-613685.html |title=Nominations for 2016 AVN Awards Released |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=November 19, 2015 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 15, 2016 |archive-date=December 31, 2015 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20151231152223/http://business.avn.com/articles/video/Nominations-for-2016-AVN-Awards-Released-613685.html |url-status=dead }}</ref>
|-
|[[34th AVN Awards|2017<br/>{{small|(34th)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* Xander Corvus
* [[James Deen]]
* [[Ryan Driller]]
* [[Markus Dupree]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* Small Hands
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* Mandingo
* [[Derrick Pierce]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* [[Toni Ribas]]
* [[Lexington Steele]]
* Chris Strokes
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="Winners">{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2017-avn-award-winners-announced-712151.html |title=2017 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 21, 2017 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=January 22, 2017}}</ref><ref>{{cite magazine|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees |title=AVN Awards 2017 Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=November 17, 2016|magazine=Adult Video News|access-date=July 12, 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170113172207/https://avn.com/awards/nominees |archive-date=January 13, 2017}}</ref>
|-
|[[35th AVN Awards|2018<br/>{{small|(35th)}}]]
|
! [[Markus Dupree]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Xander Corvus
* [[Charles Dera]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* Ricky Johnson
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* Mandingo
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* [[Toni Ribas]]
* [[Johnny Sins]]
* [[Jean Val Jean (actor)|Jean Val Jean]]
* Chad White
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="Winners2018">{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2018-avn-award-winners-announced-759869.html |title=2018 AVN Award Winners Announced |author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |date=January 28, 2018 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=February 4, 2018}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/nominees-unveiled-for-2018-avn-awards-751192.html |title=Nominees Unveiled for 2018 AVN Awards |author=Peter Warren |date=November 18, 2017 |website=Adult Video News |publisher=AVN Media Network |access-date=February 4, 2018}}</ref>
|-
|[[36th AVN Award|2019<br/>{{small|(36th)}}]]
|[[File: Manuel Ferrara 2019 by Glenn Francis.jpg|180px]]
! [[Manuel Ferrara]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Xander Corvus
* [[James Deen]]
* Dredd
* [[Markus Dupree]]
* Small Hands
* [[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]]
* Ricky Johnson
* Jessy Jones
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* Mandingo
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* [[Johnny Sins]]
|<ref name="Winners2019">{{cite magazine |url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2019-avn-813648.html|title=2019 AVN Award Winners Announced|date=January 27, 2019|magazine=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2019 Nominees AVN Awards|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=AVN Media Network|access-date=January 28, 2019}}</ref>
|}

===2020s===
{|Class="wikitable sortable"
! Year
! Photo
! Winner
! Nominees
! {{Abbr|Ref(s)|References}}
|-
|[[37th AVN Awards|2020<br/>{{small|(37th)}}]]
|rowspan="2"|[[File:Master Gio and Small Hands at Inked Awards 2016 (31953511745).jpg|180px]]
! rowspan="2"|Small Hands
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Xander Corvus
* [[Charles Dera]]
* [[Ryan Driller]]
* [[Markus Dupree]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* Seth Gamble
* [[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]]
* Ricky Johnson
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* Isiah Maxwell
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* [[Derrick Pierce]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
|<ref name="Winners2020">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2020-avn-award-winners-announced-863917.html|title=2020 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 25, 2020|access-date=January 28, 2020}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/nominees|title=2020 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 21, 2019|access-date=November 23, 2019}}</ref>
|-
|[[38th AVN Awards|2021<br/>{{small|(38th)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Xander Corvus
* [[Charles Dera]]
* Damon Dice
* [[Markus Dupree]]
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* Seth Gamble
* Ricky Johnson
* [[Keiran Lee]]
* Isiah Maxwell
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* Jax Slayher
* [[Prince Yahshua]]
|<ref name="Winners2021">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2021-avn-award-winners-announced-895732.html|title=2021 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 23, 2021|accessdate=February 23, 2021}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2021_nominees|title=2021 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 29, 2020|access-date=November 29, 2020}}</ref>
|-
|[[39th AVN Awards|2022<br/>{{small|(39th)}}]]
|[[File:Tommy Pistol 2013.jpg|180px]]
! [[Tommy Pistol]]
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Dante Colle
* Xander Corvus
* [[Charles Dera]]
* Oliver Flynn
* Quinton James
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* Seth Gamble
* Jax Slayher
* Codey Steele
* Isiah Maxwell
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* Zac Wild
* [[Michael Stefano]]
|<ref name="Winners2022">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/winners|title=2022 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 22, 2022|accessdate=January 23, 2022}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2022_nominees|title=2022 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 19, 2021|access-date=November 27, 2021}}</ref>
|-
|[[40th AVN Awards|2023<br/>{{small|(40th)}}]]
|[[File:Seth_Gamble_at_the_Perspective_movie_premiere.jpg|180px]]
! Seth Gamble 
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Nathan Bronson
* Dante Colle
* Dredd
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* Oliver Flynn
* Anton Harden
* Ricky Johnson
* Isiah Maxwell
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* Codey Steele
* Zac Wild
* [[Michael Stefano]]
|<ref name="Winners2023">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2023-avn-award-winners-announced-914695.html|title=2023 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 8, 2023|accessdate=January 10, 2023}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2023_nominees|title=2023 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 4, 2021|access-date=December 18, 2022}}</ref>
|-
|[[41st AVN Awards|2024<br/>{{small|(41st)}}]]
|
! Isiah Maxwell
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Nathan Bronson
* [[Manuel Ferrara]]
* Oliver Flynn
* Seth Gamble
* Maximo Garcia
* JMac
* Ricky Johnson
* Alex Jones
* Scott Nails
* [[Ramón Nomar]]
* [[Tommy Pistol]]
* Codey Steele
* Zac Wild
|<ref name="Winners2024">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/winners|title=2024 AVN Award Winners Announced|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 29, 2024|accessdate=February 3, 2024}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2024_nominees|title=2024 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 15, 2023|access-date=November 15, 2023}}</ref>
|-
|[[42nd AVN Awards|2025<br/>{{small|(42nd)}}]]
|rowspan="2"|
! rowspan="2"|Vince Karter
|valign="top" |
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Nathan Bronson
* Hollywood Cash
* Dan Damage
* [[Charles Dera]]
* Seth Gamble
* JMac
* Ricky Johnson
* Alex Jones
* Isiah Maxwell
* Scott Nails
* Milan Ponjevic
* Codey Steele
* Zac Wild
|<ref name="Winners2025">{{cite web|url=https://avn.com/business/articles/video/2025-avn-award-winners-announced-926775.html|title=''2025 AVN Award Winners Announced''|publisher=[[AVN Media Network|AVN]]|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|date=January 31, 2025|accessdate=January 31, 2025}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2025_nominees|title=2025 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 30, 2024|access-date=December 1, 2024}}</ref>
|-
|[[43rd AVN Awards|2026<br/>{{small|(43rd)}}]]
|valign="top" |
* Parker Ambrose
* [[Mick Blue]]
* Hollywood Cash
* Christian Clay
* [[Charles Dera]]
* Seth Gamble
* Ricky Johnson
* Jason Luv
* Isiah Maxwell
* Scott Nails
* Milan Ponjevic
* Codey Steele
* Zac Wild
|<ref name="Winners2026">{{Cite web |date=January 24, 2026 |title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced |url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971 |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20260125225505/https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971 |archive-date=January 25, 2026 |access-date=January 26, 2026 |work=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]] |language=en-US|last=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.-->|publisher=AVN Media Network}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees|title=2026 AVN Award Nominees|author=<!--Staff writer(s); no by-line.--> |publisher=[[AVN Media Network]]|date=November 21, 2025|access-date=December 4, 2025}}</ref>
|}

==Superlatives==
{|class="wikitable"
! Superlative
! Performer
! Record
|-
|Performer with most awards
|[[Manuel Ferrara]]
|6
|-
|rowspan="2"|Performer with most nominations
|[[Manuel Ferrara]]
|rowspan="2"|14
|-
|[[Erik Everhard]]
|-
|Performer with most consecutive wins
|[[Mick Blue]]<br>{{small|(2015-17)}}
|3
|-
|Performer with most consecutive nominations
|[[Keiran Lee]]<br>{{small|(2011-21)}}
|11
|-
|Performer with most nominations without ever winning
|[[Erik Everhard]]
|14
|-
|Oldest winner
|[[Tommy Pistol]]
|45
|-
|Youngest winner
|[[James Deen]]
|22
|}

==Multiple winners and nominees==
===Multiple winners===
{|class="wikitable sortable"
! Wins
! Performer
! Years
|-
! 6
|[[Manuel Ferrara]]
|[[22nd AVN Awards|2005]], [[23rd AVN Awards|2006]], [[27th AVN Awards|2010]], [[29th AVN Awards|2012]], [[31st AVN Awards|2014]], [[36th AVN Awards|2019]]
|-
! rowspan="3"|3
|[[Lexington Steele]]
|[[17th AVN Awards|2000]], [[19th AVN Awards|2002]], [[20th AVN Awards|2003]]
|-
|[[Mick Blue]]
|[[32nd AVN Awards|2015]], [[33rd AVN Awards|2016]], [[34th AVN Awards|2017]]
|-
|[[Evan Stone]]
|[[18th AVN Awards|2001]], [[25th AVN Awards|2008]], [[28th AVN Awards|2011]]
|-
! rowspan="5"|2
|[[Rocco Siffredi]]
|[[10th AVN Awards|1993]], [[13th AVN Awards|1996]]
|-
|[[James Deen]]
|[[27th AVN Awards|2009]], [[30th AVN Awards|2013]]
|-
|[[Tom Byron]]
|[[15th AVN Awards|1998]], [[16th AVN Awards|1999]]
|-
|Small Hands
|[[37th AVN Awards|2020]], [[38th AVN Awards|2021]]
|-
|Vince Karter
|[[42nd AVN Awards|2025]], [[43rd AVN Awards|2026]]
|}

===Multiple nominees===
{|class="wikitable sortable"
! Nominations
! Performer
|-
! rowspan="3"|14
|[[Erik Everhard]]
|-
|[[Manuel Ferrara]]
|-
|[[Mick Blue]]
|-
! 12
|[[Ramon Nomar]]
|-
! rowspan="2"|11
|[[Mr. Marcus]]
|-
|[[Keiran Lee]]
|-
! rowspan="5"|10
|[[Evan Stone]]
|-
|[[James Deen]]
|-
|[[Prince Yahshua]]
|-
|Xander Corvus
|-
|[[Tommy Pistol]]
|-
! 9
|Mr. Pete
|-
! 8
|[[Lexington Steele]]
|-
! rowspan="3"|7
|[[Sean Michaels (actor)|Sean Michaels]]
|-
|[[Randy Spears]]
|-
|[[Michael Stefano]]
|-
! rowspan="2"|6
|[[Toni Ribas]]
|-
|[[Steven St. Croix]]
|-
! rowspan="6"|5
|[[Rocco Siffredi]]
|-
|Mandingo
|-
|[[Tom Byron]]
|-
|[[Charles Dera]]
|-
|Seth Gamble 
|-
|Isiah Maxwell
|-
! rowspan="9"|4
|[[Max Hardcore]]
|-
|[[Mark Davis (actor)|Mark Davis]]
|-
|[[Nacho Vidal]]
|-
|[[Tommy Gunn (actor)|Tommy Gunn]]
|-
|[[Marco Banderas]]
|-
|Markus Dupree
|-
|Ricky Johnson
|-
|Scott Nails
|-
|Zac Wild
|-
! rowspan="15"|3
|[[T. T. Boy]]
|-
|[[Alex Sanders (actor)|Alex Sanders]]
|-
|[[Johnny Sins]]
|-
|[[Christoph Clark]]
|-
|[[Dave Hardman]]
|-
|[[Dillon Day]]
|-
|[[Brandon Iron]]
|-
|[[Rocco Reed]]
|-
|Anthony Rosano
|-
|Mark Wood
|-
|[[Kurt Lockwood]]
|-
|[[Ryan Driller]]
|-
|Oliver Flynn
|-
|Ricky Johnson
|-
|Codey Steele
|-
! rowspan="24" |2
|Mike Horner
|-
|[[Jon Dough]]
|-
|[[Jean Val Jean (actor)|Jean Val Jean]]
|-
|Chad White
|-
|Small Hands
|-
|Chris Strokes
|-
|Mark Ashley
|-
|[[John Strong (actor)|John Strong]]
|-
|Lee Stone
|-
|Brian Surewood
|-
|Luciano
|-
|[[Mike Adriano]]
|-
|[[Rodney Moore (actor)|Rodney Moore]]
|-
|[[Ed Powers]]
|-
|[[Vince Vouyer]]
|-
|[[Steve Holmes (actor)|Steve Holmes]]
|-
|Jax Slayher
|-
|Dante Colle
|-
|Dredd
|-
|Nathan Bronson
|-
|Codey Steele
|-
|Hollywood Cash
|-
|JMac
|-
|Milan Ponjevic
|-
|rowspan=14 |2026<ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Nominees Announced|url=https://avn.com/awards/2026_nominees|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|title=2026 AVN Award Winners Announced|url=https://avn.com/news/video/2026-avn-award-winners-announced-180971|website=[[AVN (magazine)|AVN]]}}</ref>
|rowspan=14 align=center|
|rowspan=14 align=center|'''Vince Karter'''
|align=center|Parker Ambrose
|-
|align=center|Mick Blue
|-
|align=center|Hollywood Cash
|-
|align=center|Christian Clay
|-
|align=center|Charles Dera
|-
|align=center|Seth Gamble
|-
|align=center|Ricky Johnson
|-
|align=center|Jason Luv
|-
|align=center|Isiah Maxwell
|-
|align=center|Scott Nails
|-
|align=center|Milan Ponjevic
|-
|align=center|Victor Ray
|-
|align=center|Codey Steele
|-
|align=center|Zac Wild
|}

==See also==
* [[AVN Award for Male Foreign Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Best Actor]]
* [[AVN Award for Best Supporting Actor]]
* [[AVN Award for Female Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Female Foreign Performer of the Year]]
* [[AVN Award for Transsexual Performer of the Year]]

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
* {{Official|http://avnawards.avn.com}}

{{Navboxes
|title=AVN Award for Male Performer of the Year
|list=
{{AVN}}
{{AVN Male}}
}}

[[Category:Awards established in 1993]]
[[Category:AVN Awards|Male Performer of the Year]]
[[Category:Awards for male actors]]
